story: Story 83.3 - submit_job inline-D&L extension + D&L inheritance lookups

dod_results.summary: Inline Decisions/Learnings accept attached_to_kind job/pipeline/project; server derives attached_to_id from the submitting Job.
Client-supplied attached_to_id remains rejected by the frozen extra=forbid inline models; submit service derives IDs and never reads a client ID.
get_project returns project-attached Decisions/Learnings in direct and root inherited arrays stay empty.
get_pipeline returns pipeline-attached rows in direct and parent project rows in inherited.
get_job returns job-attached rows in direct and inherited rows in pipeline-then-project order.
_resolve_attached_chain exists, is exported, is importable, and resolves a job to its job/pipeline/project chain.
Snapshot update command passed; no snapshot diff was produced because AQ2-86 changes behavior behind existing response fields and adds no tools/routes.
mypy --strict uses the corrected API+CLI CI scope and ruff includes CLI source/tests plus parity tests.
Full API + parity regression passed: 280 passed, 7 skipped, 1 known FastMCP deprecation warning.

verification.snapshot_update: 29 passed, 1 skipped, 1 warning; no snapshot diff
verification.mypy: clean across 66 source files using CI scope: apps/api/src/aq_api/ apps/cli/src/aq_cli/

risks_or_deviations: AQ2-86 produced no OpenAPI or MCP snapshot diff because AQ2-84/AQ2-85 had already introduced the schema-visible fields and tools; this story only populates existing decisions/learnings fields.
Parity tests must not be launched in parallel against the same live DB; a parallel local attempt caused fixture interference. Sequential parity and snapshot-update runs passed.
handoff: AQ2-87 and AQ2-88 may start after AQ2-86 merges; both reuse services/_inheritance.py.
